subject: The Unicorn Inc. fitting & QC workshop on the sky-island of Hemelhof, mid-morning. Pegasus wings on padded stands, glass bottles of dragon fire glowing on shelves, sky-island clouds drifting past tall arched windows.

Pixar-style stylized character portrait of Iris Manebraid, a fully unicorn-bodied senior wing-fitter at Unicorn Inc. — equine head and snout (NOT a human face with a horn glued on), large expressive eyes, fluffy mane braided over one shoulder, stylized hooves, cream-colored coat with iridescent pearl horn. Wearing a small leather work apron with a Sparkle-Stamp tool clipped to it, fitting tape draped around her neck. Warm friendly smile. Background: pastel-painted timber workshop with pegasus wings on stands softly out of focus.

Pegasus Wings (Medium) — the flagship adult flight kit from Unicorn Inc., displayed on a padded leather stand on a workshop bench. Iridescent feathers transitioning from cream at the shoulder to soft prism-rainbow at the tips, brass buckle harness, calibration tag dangling from the leading edge. Pristine condition, just Sparkle-Stamped.
